apparatus_components.type: SPDC (Spontaneous Parametric Down-Conversion) Type-II BBO crystal pumped at 405 nm; OR semiconductor quantum-dot source for higher brightness
apparatus_components.spec: Pair rate ≥ 10⁶/s; fidelity F ≥ 0.99 with maximally-entangled state

apparatus_components.type: Achromatic quarter + half wave-plates on rotation stages + Wollaston polarizing beamsplitters
apparatus_components.spec: Angular precision ≤ 0.01° on each setting; extinction ratio > 10⁴

apparatus_components.type: Superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) at 850-1550 nm
apparatus_components.spec: η_det ≥ 0.93; dark count rate < 100 Hz; timing jitter < 50 ps

apparatus_components.type: FPGA-based time-tagger with multi-channel coincidence logic

apparatus_components.spec: Stable temperature drift < 50 mK over hours

apparatus_components.type: Reference Bell state generator + active phase stabilization

controls: Maximally-mixed state (S should = 0): tests apparatus zero-bias
Product state (S should ≤ 2 exactly): tests CHSH-inequality boundary
Vary entanglement fidelity (S vs F linear regression): tests source-fidelity slope
Vary polarization angle settings off optimum (S vs angle curve): tests systematic
Repeat measurement at different times of day (S stability): tests environmental drift
Repeat after apparatus realignment (S stability): tests calibration robustness
